structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Heating Hot-Water Plant Request
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Send heating hot-water plant request: 1 request when HW valve >95%, until valve <10%; else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: HW valve position.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. If HW valve >95% → 1 request until <10%; b. else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. If the HW valve position  is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less
than 10%.
b. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

evidence_quote:
a. If the HW valve position  is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less
than 10%.
b. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
evidence_text:
a. If the HW valve position  is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is less
than 10%.
b. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
judge_reason: Operational sequence for heating hot-water plant request.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Fan Status Mismatch Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Alarm if fan command and status differ for 15 seconds. Commanded on/status off is Level 2; commanded off/status on is Level 4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan status different from command for 15 seconds.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status being different from the command for a period of 15 seconds.
a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2
b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4

evidence_quote:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status being different from the command for a period of 15 seconds.
a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2
b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4
evidence_text:
Fan alarm is indicated by the status being different from the command for a period of 15 seconds.
a. Commanded on, status off: Level 2
b. Commanded off, status on: Level 4
judge_reason: Fault diagnostic rule for fan status mismatch.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Alarm Delay
structured_payload_candidate.summary: A fault condition must persist continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before operator notification.

A fault condition that evaluates as true must do so continuously for AlarmDelay minutes before it is
reported to the operator.

evidence_quote:

reported to the operator.
evidence_text:

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Test Mode
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Test mode sets ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for TestModeDelay minutes to enable instant AFDD testing.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Test mode active.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 for TestModeDelay.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Test mode shall temporarily set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for a period of
TestModeDelay minutes to allow instant test ing of the AFDD system and ensure normal fault
detection occurs after testing is complete.

evidence_quote:
Test mode shall temporarily set ModeDelay and AlarmDelay to 0 minutes for a period of
TestModeDelay minutes to allow instant test ing of the AFDD system and ensure normal fault
detection occurs after testing is complete.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Filter Pressure Drop Alarm
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Level 4 alarm when filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa for 10 minutes with fan speed >20% MaxCoolSpeed. Alarm limit varies with fan speed as DPx = DP100 * (x)^1.4.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan speed > 20% MaxCoolSpeed, and filter ΔP > max(alarm limit, 12.5 Pa) for 10 minutes.
structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: Filter ΔP exceeds limit for 10 min while fan speed > 20% MaxCoolSpeed
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan
speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed:  Level 4.  The alarm limit shall vary with fan speed as
follows:
𝐷𝑃𝑥=𝐷𝑃100(𝑥)1.4

evidence_quote:
Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan
speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed:  Level 4.  The alarm limit shall vary with fan speed as
follows:
𝐷𝑃𝑥=𝐷𝑃100(𝑥)1.4
evidence_text:
Filter pressure drop exceeds the larger of the alarm limit or 12.5 Pa (0.05”) for 10 minutes when fan
speed exceeds 20% of MaxCoolSpeed:  Level 4.  The alarm limit shall vary with fan speed as
follows:
𝐷𝑃𝑥=𝐷𝑃100(𝑥)1.4
judge_reason: Fault diagnostic rule for filter pressure drop.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Testing/Commissioning Override Switches
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Provide software switches interlocked to a CHW and hot-water plant level to force HW valve full open/closed and CHW valve full open/closed.
structured_payload_candidate.commissioning_check: Software switches to force HW valve open/close, CHW valve open/close for leakage testing.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW  and hot -water plant level to
a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot -water coil,
b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot -water coil,
c. force CHW valv e full open if there is a CHW coil, and
d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.

evidence_quote:
Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW  and hot -water plant level to
a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot -water coil,
b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot -water coil,
c. force CHW valv e full open if there is a CHW coil, and
d. force CHW valve full closed if there is a CHW coil.
evidence_text:
Provide software switches that interlock to a CHW  and hot -water plant level to
a. force HW valve full open if there is a hot -water coil,
b. force HW valve full closed if there is a hot -water coil,
c. force CHW valv e full open if there is a CHW coil, and

judge_reason: Commissioning step for FCU override switches.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Cooling Mode Sequence
structured_payload_candidate.section_title: Supply Fan Speed and Supply Air Temperature Control
structured_payload_candidate.equipment_scope: FCU cooling coil, supply fan, heating coil
structured_payload_candidate.summary: When a cooling coil exists and zone state is Cooling, fan speed and supply air temperature setpoint are controlled based on the cooling-loop signal. Cooling coil modulates to SATsp; heating coil is off.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Cooling coil present AND Zone State is Cooling.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: For loop signal 0%-50%, FANsp=MinCoolSpeed; for 50%-100%, FANsp resets from MinCoolSpeed to MaxCoolSpeed. For 0%-50%, SATsp resets from zone cooling setpoint to Cool_SAT; for 50%-100%, SATsp=Cool_SAT. Cooling coil modulates to SATsp via PID. Heating coil OFF.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
c. If there is a cooling coil,  when Zone State  is Cooling
1. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed.
2. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to
MaxCoolSpeed.
3. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zo ne cooling
setpoint to Cool_SAT.
4. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT.
5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature
at SATsp .
6. Heating coil OFF

evidence_quote:
c. If there is a cooling coil,  when Zone State  is Cooling
1. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed.
2. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to
MaxCoolSpeed.
3. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zo ne cooling
setpoint to Cool_SAT.
4. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT.
5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature
at SATsp .
6. Heating coil OFF
evidence_text:
c. If there is a cooling coil,  when Zone State  is Cooling
1. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, FANsp is MinCoolSpeed.
2. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, FANsp is reset from MinCoolSpeed to
MaxCoolSpeed.
3. For a cooling -loop signal of 0% to 50%, SATsp is reset from the active zo ne cooling
setpoint to Cool_SAT.
4. For a cooling -loop signal of 50% to 100%, SATsp is Cool_SAT.
5. The cooling coil shall be modulated with a PID loop to maintain the discharge temperature
at SATsp .
6. Heating coil OFF
judge_reason: Operational sequence for FCU cooling mode control.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Operating State Definition
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Operating state defined by commanded valve positions: OS#1 Heating if heating valve >0 and cooling =0; OS#2 No Heating or Cooling if both =0; OS#3 Cooling if heating =0 and cooling >0; OS#4 Unknown otherwise.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Continuous evaluation.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
The OS of each FCU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating -coil control valve
and cooling -coil control  valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2.

evidence_quote:
The OS of each FCU shall be defined by the commanded positions of the heating -coil control valve
and cooling -coil control  valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2.
evidence_text:

and cooling -coil control  valve in accordance with Table 5.20.6.2.
judge_reason: AFDD operating state definition based on valve positions.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Fault Condition FC#1: Too Many OS Changes
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault if ΔOS > ΔOSmax. Indicates unstable control.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: ΔOS > ΔOS MAX
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC #1  Equation  OS > OS MAX Applies to OS #1 – #4 Description  Too many changes in Operating State Possible Diagnosis  Unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem

evidence_quote: FC #1  Equation  OS > OS MAX Applies to OS #1 – #4 Description  Too many changes in Operating State Possible Diagnosis  Unstable control due to poorly tuned loop or mechanical problem

judge_reason: AFDD fault condition for too many OS changes.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Fault Condition FC#2: SAT Too Low in Full Heating
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault if SAT_AVG < SATSP - εSAT and HC ≥ 99%. Possible stuck/cooling valve leak, sensor error, etc.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT_AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99%
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC #2  Equation  SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99% Applies to OS #1 Description  SAT too low in full heating Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve leaking or stuck open Heating coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized heating coil HW temperature too low or HW unavailable Gas or electric heat is unavailable DX cooling is stuck on

evidence_quote: FC #2  Equation  SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99% Applies to OS #1 Description  SAT too low in full heating Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve leaking or stuck open Heating coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized heating coil HW temperature too low or HW unavailable Gas or electric heat is unavailable DX cooling is stuck on
evidence_text: FC #2  Equation  SAT AVG < SATSP - ƐSAT and HC ≥ 99% Applies to OS #1 Description  SAT too low in full heating Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve leaking or stuck open Heating coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized heating coil HW temperature too low or HW unavailable Gas or electric heat is unavailable DX cooling is stuck on
judge_reason: AFDD fault condition for SAT too low in full heating.

structured_payload_candidate.fault_condition: SAT AVG > SAT SP + Ɛ SAT and CC ≥ 99%

evidence_quote: FC #3  Equation  SAT AVG > SAT SP + Ɛ SAT and CC ≥ 99% Applies to OS #3 Description  SAT too high in full cooling Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized cooling coil CHW temperature too high or CHW unavailable DX cooling unavailable Gas or electric heat stuck on Heating coil valve leaking or stuck open
evidence_text: FC #3  Equation  SAT AVG > SAT SP + Ɛ SAT and CC ≥ 99% Applies to OS #3 Description  SAT too high in full cooling Possible Diagnosis  SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck closed or actuator failure Fouled or undersized cooling coil CHW temperature too high or CHW unavailable DX cooling unavailable Gas or electric heat stuck on Heating coil valve leaking or stuck open

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Fault Condition FC#4: Temperature Drop Across Inactive Cooling Coil (Cooling-only FCU with RAT)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Fault if SAT_AVG – RAT ≥ √(εRAT² + εSAT²) + ΔTSF in OS#2. Indicates leaking cooling coil or sensor error.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: SAT AVG – RAT ≥ √ƐRAT² + ƐSAT² + TSF, OS #2, cooling-only FCU with RAT
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: FC#4  Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥  √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + TSF Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT)  Description  Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil Possible Diagnosis  RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking DX cooling stuck on

evidence_quote: FC#4  Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥  √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + TSF Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT)  Description  Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil Possible Diagnosis  RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking DX cooling stuck on
evidence_text: FC#4  Equation SAT AVG – RAT ≥  √ƐRAT2+ ƐSAT2 + TSF Applies to OS #2 (cooling only FCU with RAT)  Description  Temperature drop across inactive cooling coil Possible Diagnosis  RAT sensor error SAT sensor error Cooling coil valve stuck open or leaking DX cooling stuck on
judge_reason: AFDD fault condition for temperature drop across inactive cooling coil.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU AFDD Evaluation Suspension
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Suspend fault evaluation when FCU not operating, or for ModeDelay minutes following a change in any Zone Group mode.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: FCU not operating, or zone group mode change (e.g., to Occupied).
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended under the following conditions:
a. When FCU is not operating
b. For a period of ModeDelay  minutes following a change in mode (e.g., from Warmup  Mode or
Cooldown  Mode to Occupied  Mode ) of any Zone Group  served by the FCU.

evidence_quote:
Evaluation of fault conditions shall be suspended under the following conditions:
a. When FCU is not operating

Cooldown  Mode to Occupied  Mode ) of any Zone Group  served by the FCU.

judge_reason: Application guidance for AFDD evaluation suspension.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Chilled-Water Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate CHW reset requests based on fan speed, SAT deviation, and CHW valve position. Suppress if fan not at MaxCoolSpeed.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan speed condition and SAT/valve state.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Suppress all if fan ≠ MaxCoolSpeed; b. SAT > setpoint+10°F for 5 min → 3 requests; c. SAT > setpoint+5°F for 5 min → 2 requests; d. CHW valve >95% → 1 request until <85%; e. else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. All requests shall be suppressed (send 0 requests) if fan is not at MaxCoolSpeed.
b. If the supply air temperature is 10°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 3 requests,
c. Else if the supply air temperature is 5°F greater than setpoint for 5 minutes, send 2 requests,
d. Else if the CHW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1  request until the CHW valve
position is less than 85%.
e. Else if the CHW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.

structured_payload_candidate.title: FCU Hot-Water Reset Requests
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Generate HW reset requests. Suppress if fan not at MaxHeatSpeed. Requests based on SAT deviation below setpoint and HW valve position.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Fan speed condition and SAT/valve state.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: a. Suppress all if fan ≠ MaxHeatSpeed; b. SAT < setpoint - 30°F for 5 min → 3 requests; c. SAT < setpoint -15°F for 5 min → 2 requests; d. HW valve >95% → 1 request until <85%; e. else 0.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote:
a. All requests shall be suppressed (send 0 requests) if fan is not at MaxHeatSpeed.
b. If the supply air temperature is 17°C (30°F) less than SATsp for 5 minutes, send 3 requests.
c. Else if the supply air temperature is 8°C (15°F) less than SATsp for 5 minutes, send 2 requests.
d. Else if HW valve position is greater than 95%, send 1 request until the HW valve position is
less than 8 5%.
e. Else if the HW valve position is less than 95%, send 0 requests.
